title: ship-gate release summary
description: Release-blocking schema for releases/<version>/summary.json. The landing page reads the highest-semver summary.json in releases/ as 'current'. Validated by .github/workflows/release-summary-gate.yml on every v* tag push. ship-gate is a substrate-only gate (see docs/governance.md): the top-level `verdict` field carries the substrate four-phase verdict, and `nhi_verdict` is the parallel field for the NHI behavioral verdict. ship-gate never sets `nhi_verdict` to anything other than null — the NHI verdict for a given release is provided by the per-release A2A campaign that runs after ship-gate passes. Keeping the field present (with null) makes this schema parallel with the per-release A2A campaign's release surface so consumers can read either schema without crashing on a missing field.

nhi_verdict.description: NHI (utility) verdict for this release. ship-gate is substrate-only and ALWAYS emits null here. The non-null NHI verdict for a release is published by the per-release A2A campaign (ai-memory-a2a-v<release>) after ship-gate passes. Keeping this field present in the ship-gate schema (with null) keeps the schema parallel with the per-release A2A campaign's release surface so cross-layer consumers (test-hub aggregator, external auditors) can read either source without branching on a missing field. See docs/governance.md.
